title: Arctic Refuge Drilling Fails Again: A Victory for Conservation and Common Sense
summary: Big news from the Arctic Refuge: The latest oil and gas lease sale for the Coastal Plain bombed—not a single bid. Zero. Nada. This was supposed to be a cornerstone of Trump’s 2017 Tax Act’s promise to generate $2.2 billion for the American people. Instead, it’s yet another reminder that drilling the Arctic isn’t just bad for the planet—it’s bad business. The End of a Fossil Fuel Fantasy Let’s be clear: This flop of a lease sale isn’t a random fluke....

title: NRC Shareholder Trust Declares 2025 Spring Distribution
summary: On Jan. 17, 2025, the NANA Regional Corporation Inc. Board of Directors authorized a contribution to the NRC Shareholder Trust for the purpose of paying a spring distribution to Trust beneficiaries of $8.05 per share, for a total distribution of approximately $14.5 million . title: City Hall and the Refuse Department will be closed on Monday, January 20th, in observance of Martin Luther King Jr. Day.
summary: The City of Cordova Refuse Department and City Hall will be closed on Monday, January 20th, 2025, in observance of Martin Luther King Jr Day. Trash collection will not occur on this day. Trash pickup scheduled for Monday the 20th will be collected on Tuesday, January 21st. The post City Hall and the...

title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: January 16, 2025
summary: January 16, 2025: The Arctic sea ice has continued to increase this week but at a lesser rate of 1.49% (as opposed to last week’s increase rate of 3.09%), from the level on 01/09/2025 of 12.924 M km 2 to 13.119 M km 2 for this week. title: TikTok Ban: What It Means for Small Businesses in Alaska
summary: The Supreme Court has upheld the TikTok ban, but the Biden administration has opted not to enforce it, leaving the decision to President-elect Donald Trump. title: The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 13 January, 2025
summary: Take Five is The Arctic Institute's weekly redux on the Arctic's most important stories, published every Friday. The post The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 13 January, 2025 appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .

title: Alaska SBDC Closed Jan 20 in Observance of MLK Jr. Day & Alaska Civil Rights Day
summary: Alaska SBDC offices will be closed on Monday, January 20, 2025 , in observance of Martin Luther King, Jr. Day in Celebration of Alaska Civil Rights in alignment with UAA’s holiday schedule.
